basic_details.job_title: NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: NIT Rourkela is recruiting 01 Junior Research Fellow for a MoES-funded project on CO2 variation in Chilika Lake. Candidates with strong background in Civil Engineering, Geology, Earth Sciences or Environmental Sciences can apply.

age_limit.details: Upper age limit is 28 years as on the last date of application. Age relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/PwD/Female candidates and 3 years for OBC (Non-creamy layer).

qualification.details: criteria: Details | desirable skills: Good knowledge on River management and Remote Sensing. GATE qualified candidates will be given priority | job responsibilities: Sample collection, fieldwork, laboratory work and report writing
qualification.education_qualification: B.E/B.Tech or M.Tech in Civil Engineering, M.Sc/M.Sc Tech/M.Tech in Geology, Applied Geology, Earth Science, Environmental Sciences, Remote Sensing or similar discipline with minimum 65% marks or CGPA 7.0 + GATE/NET/GPAT or any other national level exam qualification

selection_process: Selection will be based on shortlisting of applications followed by Online Interview. Only shortlisted candidates will be informed. Final selection is subject to verification of documents and performance in the interview.
how_to_apply: Prepare a single PDF file containing filled & signed application form along with all supporting documents (educational certificates, mark sheets, GATE/NET score card, experience certificates, etc.).
Send the PDF via email to the PI ([email protected]) with the subject line mentioning the Advertisement No.
Application link: NIT Rourkela Homepage → FACULTY & STAFF → SRICCE → Career → Notices
important_instructions: Engagement is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. No hard copy of the application is required. Mere fulfillment of minimum qualification does not guarantee interview call. The institute reserves the right to shortlist candidates as per project needs. Any suppression of facts will lead to cancellation of candidature.

content_sections.heading: NIT Rourkela JRF Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: NIT Rourkela is recruiting 01 Junior Research Fellow for a MoES-funded project on CO2 variation in Chilika Lake. Candidates with strong background in Civil Engineering, Geology, Earth Sciences or Environmental Sciences can apply.

rows.national_institute_of_technology_rourkel: Seasonal and Interannual Variation of Partial Pressure of CO2 in Chilika Lake and Devi River Estuary

rows.details: B.E/B.Tech or M.Tech in Civil Engineering, M.Sc/M.Sc Tech/M.Tech in Geology, Applied Geology, Earth Science, Environmental Sciences, Remote Sensing or similar discipline with minimum 65% marks or CGPA 7.0 + GATE/NET/GPAT or any other national level exam qualification
Good knowledge on River management and Remote Sensing. GATE qualified candidates will be given priority
Sample collection, fieldwork, laboratory work and report writing

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Rourkela JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting the application is 21 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many JRF vacancies are available in NIT Rourkela MoES Project?
faq.answer: There is 01 vacancy for Junior Research Fellow.

faq.question: Q3. What is the fellowship amount for JRF at NIT Rourkela?
faq.answer: The fellowship is Rs. 37,000/- per month (consolidated).

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification for NIT Rourkela JRF 2026?
faq.answer: B.E/B.Tech/M.Tech in Civil Engineering or M.Sc/M.Tech in Geology, Earth Science, Environmental Sciences, Remote Sensing etc. with minimum 65% marks and GATE/NET qualification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Upper age limit is 28 years (with relaxation for reserved categories).

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for NIT Rourkela JRF position?
faq.answer: Send a single PDF of filled application and documents to [email protected] before 21 July 2026.

faq.question: Q7. When is the online interview for NIT Rourkela JRF?
faq.answer: The online interview is scheduled on 22 July 2026 at 10:00 AM.

faq.question: Q8. Is GATE qualification mandatory for NIT Rourkela JRF?
faq.answer: GATE/NET or any other national level exam qualification is required. GATE candidates will be given priority.

faq.question: Q9. What is the project duration for NIT Rourkela JRF 2026?
faq.answer: The project tenure is up to 04 February 2027.

faq.question: Q10. Is the JRF position at NIT Rourkela permanent?
faq.answer: No, the position is purely temporary/contractual and co-terminus with the project.
